detailed_description: This video visually demonstrates the 'before and after' effects on a woman's abdomen following a healthy, whole food-based, high-protein meal. Initially, her stomach appears flat, representing the 'before' state. Subsequently, she reveals a slightly distended abdomen, illustrating the natural physiological response, commonly known as bloating, that can occur even after consuming nutritious food. The video aims to normalize these bodily changes.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the semantic core, directly demonstrating the 'before and after' comparison of the woman's abdomen following a meal. It visually conveys the core message about post-meal body changes, which is explicitly stated in the on-screen text.
